name: Essence of the Body body armour (Normal start)
description: Guarantee a Life mod on a body armour via an essence, then exalt for resistances and defensive scaling.

steps.outcome: Normal → Magic with one random modifier.

steps.verb: Lesser Essence of the Body (or higher tier)
steps.outcome: Magic → Rare with a guaranteed +maximum Life modifier. Step up to Greater or Perfect tier if the base is ilvl 35+/50+ to roll higher-tier mods.
Each Exalt adds one random mod (up to 6 total). Aim for at least 2 resistance rolls before stopping. Quality of mods scales with item level — high ilvl bases roll bigger numbers.

notes_for_user: Solid baseline body armour. The Life mod is your floor — even if Exalt fills are middling, the result is wearable. For a tankier build, use a strength-base armour (e.g. Plate Vest) so the Life prefix tiers higher. Advanced: 'Omen of Sinistral Exaltation' forces prefix-only adds, useful if you want to lock in defensive prefixes.
